version_comparison.purpose: Immutable v1 was acquired after full v3 reading because the same title/system name hides a material construct and implementation redesign; v1 is comparison evidence, not the version used for v3 result claims.
version_comparison.material_boundary: V1 describes an environment-normalization and README-derived Artifact Evaluation Graph system evaluated on 48 artifacts; v3 replaces this with ArtifactGuide, phase skills, packet checking, 60 artifacts, repeated configured-system comparisons, and a reviewer study. The v1 AE Graph is absent from v3 and must not be attributed to the v3 instrument.

v3_cited_figshare.paper_locator: v3 reference [1], p. 11; Section III-C says the complete ArtifactGuide with examples is available in this artifact
v3_cited_figshare.access_result: An unauthenticated direct request returned an AWS WAF challenge rather than artifact metadata or files. This environment could not inspect file names, checksums, code, rubrics, skills, datasets, reports, or paper-version correspondence. This is an access limitation, not evidence that the files do not exist.

separately_discovered_zenodo_candidate.description: Artifact of ArtifactCopilot submitted to ISSTA 2026
separately_discovered_zenodo_candidate.creator: ANONYMOUS AUTHOR
separately_discovered_zenodo_candidate.release_boundary: The public record metadata identifies an anonymous, restricted ISSTA 2026 ArtifactCopilot artifact, but exposes no file list or checksums. The files endpoint denied unauthenticated access. This is not the artifact URL cited by v3; v1 discusses Zenodo while v3 cites a Figshare share. The record was modified one day before arXiv v3, but the available evidence does not establish which paper version the inaccessible files implement. Do not claim release inspectability, reproducibility, file contents, or paper-version correspondence.

release.overall_boundary: The v3-cited Figshare endpoint was blocked by a WAF challenge in this environment, and the separate restricted Zenodo candidate denied file access. No implementation or dataset artifact was audited. Preserve the two records separately; neither establishes paper-time or version-specific implementation identity.
